title: Can you name every Ballon d'Or winner in 20 minutes?
content:
Paris St-Germain forward Ousmane Dembele won the men's Ballon d'Or - widely regarded as football's most prestigious individual award - on Monday.

For this week's big Tuesday quiz we've gone bigger than ever before and want you to name all 69 winners of the men's Ballon d'Or.

Only the most knowledgeable of fans will get 100% in this one. What score will you get? You have 20 minutes. Good luck!

Can you name every team in the Champions League?

Can you name the line-ups from the 2008 Champions League final?

Can you name every EFL Cup-winning team in 10 minutes?

Fancy testing your memory? Playlast week's quizor go to our dedicatedfootball quizzes pageand sign up for notifications to get the latest quizzes sent straight to your device.
